title: Product Manager - Mobile Workspace
description:
Make an Impact by:

 Product Strategy & Ownership

  • Define and own the product vision, roadmap, and lifecycle for 5G-enabled enterprise mobility solutions.
  • Develop use case-driven offerings that leverage Singtel’s 5G+ network slicing capabilities to create differentiated value.
  • Drive end-to-end product ownership, including business case development, commercial models, and P&L accountability.

Solution Design & Go-to-Market

  • Design modular, scalable solution bundles integrating 5G+ services with cloud-managed platforms and enterprise devices.
  • Build comprehensive go-to-market (GTM) strategies, pricing, and packaging to support both direct and channel-led sales motions.
  • Partner with sales, marketing, and channel enablement teams to launch, position, and scale the product across priority verticals.

Ecosystem & Platform Integration

  • Collaborate with device OEMs, application providers, and system integrators to co-develop and co-market innovative solutions.
  • Work with engineering and platform teams to integrate Telco APIs, policy controls, analytics, and customer provisioning into a unified experience.

Customer Engagement & Product Optimization

  • Lead pilots, proof-of-concept initiatives, and early customer adoption programs in industries such as logistics, retail, manufacturing, and field services.
  • Collect and analyze enterprise customer feedback to inform product enhancements and roadmap prioritization.
  • Track and optimize KPIs include attach rate, ARPU uplift, NPS, time-to-activate, and solution-level profitability.

Lead Productization & Operational Enablement

  • Oversee the technical architecture and end-to-end design of the solution, ensuring adherence to SLAs for availability, resilience, security, and scalability.
  • Collaborate with IT, billing, support, and operations teams to design and implement provisioning, billing, and support processes, complete with clear documentation and workflow alignment.

Skills for Success:

  • Bachelor's degree in Telecommunications, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field; MBA is a strong advantage.
  • Minimum 8 years of B2B product management experience, ideally in telecommunications, ICT, or managed mobility services.
  • Deep understanding of 5G enterprise use cases, cloud-native architecture, mobile security, and connectivity platforms.
  • Proven success in developing and launching subscription-based, platform-led, or as-a-service enterprise offerings.
  • Excellent cross-functional leadership, stakeholder engagement, and commercial acumen.

postedCompany.description:
The Singtel Group is Asia's leading communications group, providing a wide spectrum of multimedia and infocomms technology (ICT) solutions across 3 global business units.

Group Consumer focuses on next-generation communication, infotainment and technology services to consumers and small businesses. Group Enterprise provides innovative and comprehensive ICT solutions, i.e. satellite services, international data and managed services, cloud computing, enterprise mobility services, and end-to-end solutions. Group Digital L!fe strives to bring people together with a cutting edge mix of digital services such as NextGen TV, e-books, music, digital concierge, cloud-based gaming and hyperlocal content.

Headquartered in Singapore, Singtel’s 130 years of operating experience has played a pivotal role in the country’s transformation into a major communications hub. Our Australian arm, Optus is an innovative leader in integrated telecommunications. Through our strategic investments in five regional mobile operators, Telkomsel, Globe Telecom, Advanced Info Service, PBTL, and Bharti Airtel, we are a major communications player in Asia and Africa.

Singtel is the largest listed company on the Singapore Exchange by market capitalisation. We have a vast network of offices in countries and territories throughout Asia Pacific, in Europe, USA and Australia. The Group employs more than 21,000 staff worldwide and has served 468 million mobile customers globally as of 31 March 2013.
postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE TELECOMMUNICATIONS LIMITED
